description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On April 11, 2024 at 10:14 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a heavy truck on Vallejo Street at Stockton Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling westbound on Vallejo Street and stopped at a red light. A heavy truck was turning left onto Vallejo Street 
from Stockton Street. As the heavy truck approached, the Waymo AV started to slowly reverse to make more space. The test driver 
transitioned to manual, and the driver’s side of the heavy truck and the driver's side front corner of the Waymo AV made contact. The heavy 
truck left the scene. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual 
mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
